---
title: "Investigating Spatial Distribution of Cetacean in the British Gibraltar Territorial Waters (BGTW)"
author: "Simon Gendrisch"   
keywords: [Cetacean, BGTW, Spatial Distribution, Kernel Density Estimation, Land Based Surveys]

format: 

  typst:
        number-sections: true
        template-partials: 
          - typst/typst-show.typ
          - typst/journal/typst-template.typ
        output-file: M8.2_JournalArticle_206708
        citeproc: true
bibliography: refs.bib
csl: "SoMESHarvard.csl"

---

# Abstract

{{< pagebreak >}}

```{=typst}
#[
```

# Generative AI (GenAI) Use
This is just a short summary of how AI was used. See Declaration of Originality and use of Gen AI for more details.

{{< pagebreak >}}

```{=typst}
] <no-wc>
```


# Introduction





# Methods {#methods-sec .unnumbered}

{{< include ./journal_chapters/j_methods.qmd >}}


{{< pagebreak >}}

# Results


{{< pagebreak >}}

# Discussion


{{< pagebreak >}}

```{=typst}
#[
```

# Acknowledgements 


{{< pagebreak >}}

# Conflict of Interest
The authors declare that the research was conducted in the absence of any commercial or financial relationships that could be construed as a potential conflict of interest.

# Supplementary Material
Please see Supplementary Material for further information related to this study.

# Science Communication output

{{< include ./chapters/comms.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

# References
::: {#refs}
:::

```{=typst}
] <no-wc>
```
